normalization.notes: Store encoded Old Italic text in NFC and preserve transliteration and source orientation. Do not normalize mirrored or period-specific letter forms into Latin lookalikes.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Old Italic letters, right-to-left orientation, personal-name chunks, separators, and transliteration labels
segmentation.notes: This v1 uses an Etruscan-leaning boundary. Old Italic covers multiple related alphabets and inscription directions so orientation and language labels must be explicit per lesson.
